name: RustyRAG
desc: Production-grade RAG API built in Rust. Hybrid search with HNSW dense vectors and BM25 sparse matching, cross-encoder reranking, layout-aware document extracti…
descFull: Production-grade RAG API built in Rust. Hybrid search with HNSW dense vectors and BM25 sparse matching, cross-encoder reranking, layout-aware document extraction via Docling, and 94.5% accuracy on Open RAG Bench. Powered by Cerebras, Groq, Milvus, and Jina AI.
